name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】🎉New Arrival Shoulder Bag🎉1BC233 is here🙊 This modern and versatile shoulder bag is made of Re-Nylon with exquisite leather details. Spacious capacity, the refined and versatile silhouette showcases the Prada brand essence. With gold metal hardware, zipper closure with an elegant lock, it is even more chic. The commuter style is casual or cool😎, practical and stylish, super tasteful😘. Dimensions: 27x12x10.5cm
